examples: Every conceivable Protestant sect was publishing treatises of theological speculation and religious propaganda at a surprising rate.
I think Milton is encouraging us to question, to wrestle with the theological certainties that the rest of the poem labors to establish.
Kuyper's theological and political views are linked.
And I think maybe we are entering into theological territory here as well as psychological territory.
Never mind that I had long struggled with the theological implications of life's evident unfairness.
